title: ERP Returns — Bronze Source Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating raw ERP return records from daily CSV files before ingestion into brz_freshsip.erp_returns_raw.

return_id.description: Unique return transaction identifier; used for deduplication in Silver

transaction_id.description: Originating POS transaction identifier; may be null for ERP-only return adjustments

order_id.description: Originating ERP order identifier; used for cross-reference with erp_sales_raw

retailer_id.description: Retailer account that initiated the return

quantity_returned.description: Units returned; cast to INTEGER in Silver; must be positive

return_amount.description: Credit amount issued in USD; cast to DECIMAL in Silver; must be positive

return_date.description: Date the return was processed in ERP; cast to DATE in Silver

return_reason_code.description: Standardized reason code for the return; validated against reference list in Silver
